name: M:GTA.Math.Vector2.DistanceSquared(GTA.Math.Vector2,GTA.Math.Vector2)
summary: Calculates the squared distance between two vectors.
returns: The squared distance between the two vectors.

params.name: position1
params.description: The first vector to calculate the squared distance to the second vector.

params.name: position2
params.description: The second vector to calculate the squared distance to the first vector.
